ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISNEW(), ISPICKVAL( Request_Type__c , 'Amendment' ), OR( ISBLANK(Customer_Full_Legal_Name__c), ISBLANK(Account_Billing_Address__c ), ISBLANK(Extension_Renewal_Period__c ), ISBLANK(Additional_License_Features__c ), ISBLANK(All_License_Features__c ), ISBLANK(Additional_License_Fee__c ), ISBLANK(Total_License_Fee__c ), ISBLANK(Number_of_Approved_Installments__c ), ISBLANK(TEXT(Change_of_Payment_Terms__c )), ISBLANK(TEXT(Opportunity_Type__c)) ))
